_comment: Binds the committed confidential SP1 guest ELFs to the verifying keys they must be deployed with. Two ELFs from one `cargo prove build`: elf/cxfer-guest (the settle guest → program_vkey, immutable PROGRAM_VKEY) and elf/reflection-prover (the Bitcoin-state relay prover → bitcoin_relay_vkey, immutable BITCOIN_RELAY_VKEY). verify-vkey-pin.sh asserts both sha256s on every PR. A rebuild that changes either ELF MUST regenerate its vkey + update this file IN THE SAME COMMIT, then redeploy ConfidentialPool with the new immutable vkey — otherwise every settle (resp. every attestBitcoinStateProven) reverts. Each vkey is the key a REAL Groth16 proof of THAT ELF verifies against on-chain (test/ConfidentialSwapProofReal.t.sol, test/ConfidentialReflectionProofReal.t.sol). The two share cxfer-core, so a cxfer-core change rebuilds BOTH — committing the ELFs is what keeps the prover box running the pinned bytes rather than a drifting rebuild.
_vkey_authority: program_vkey + bitcoin_relay_vkey are the AUTHORITATIVE deploy vkeys for the committed ELFs; guest_state below is descriptive prose only (it has lagged the fields before). These four fields are the ONLY occurrences of those key names in this file — every history block uses deployed_*-prefixed names so it can never shadow them. The vkey<->ELF binding is enforced mechanically at prove time by the EXPECT_VKEY / ELF_VKEY_PIN guard in exec-prove.rs (program_vkey) and exec-reflect-prove.rs (bitcoin_relay_vkey), and at deploy time by DeployConfidentialPool's require(vkey == .program_vkey). After any ELF rebuild, derive both vkeys on the prover host and reconcile every field here in the same commit.
guest_state: Frozen-guest re-prove (branch confidential-relay-fees): the per-swap protocol-fee skim (OP_SWAP carve, dormant — deprecated for day-1, all 5 admin pools no-skim), the CdpMint owner/nonce position-leaf preimage, and the fund-conservation audit hardening rebuilt BOTH shared-cxfer-core ELFs, so both vkeys rotated. Settle guest 0x00c3d4863edfbfcfc94c0f854cae57f98a7aea98cc5cb6c7ad1e33948a232bae (ELF sha 6b2d3bd9414e33d661a27ea536803fb3b2031501fa3f801f78c7d20125dd1b19, 1037968 bytes); reflection guest 0x0014b726c0ae74b7e10821c816d9478b4e1b34c75c4b870165636154bc5aec56 (ELF sha e65777b5073f16b9117bce8b81c893fdc934762b774b067655f0c10ff21de9a9, 1074656 bytes). All 23 Groth16 fixtures regenerated on the RTX 4090 (canonical cargo-prove) and verified on-chain via test/*ProofReal.t.sol, including the new OP_UNWRAP exit fixture. Farm-op + reflection settle serializers complete (the prior pending note is resolved). Redeploy ConfidentialPool with both immutable vkeys.

_coordinated_reprove_2026_06_20.status: Both confidential ELFs rebuilt + canonical vkeys derived on the Vast prover box (RTX 4090). The AUTHORITATIVE results are the top-level program_vkey/bitcoin_relay_vkey + sha256 fields above (an earlier same-day settle build was superseded by the committed one described in guest_state). Real Groth16 fixtures regenerated and green (test/*ProofReal.t.sol).
_coordinated_reprove_2026_06_20.remaining: RESOLVED: farm-op + unwrap settle serializers complete; all 23 settle+reflection Groth16 fixtures regenerated from the committed ELFs and green.

_deployed_onchain_sepolia_live.status: What is ACTUALLY on-chain now, read directly from the deployed pool on 2026-06-25 (cast call PROGRAM_VKEY()/BITCOIN_RELAY_VKEY()). The deployed_* keys are renamed so they never collide with the authoritative top-level fields that verify-vkey-pin.sh / DeployConfidentialPool read; this is a record of live state, NOT deploy targets. To be SUPERSEDED by the authoritative top-level vkeys (0x00c3d486 / 0x0014b726) on the next ConfidentialPool redeploy (the pending B-1 launch step).
_deployed_onchain_sepolia_live.verified_onchain_2026_06_25: Read from pool 0x991726A547DCdB57ba660E395D9c7D7C3FcAdF79 (Sepolia, deployBlock 11057316). nextLeafIndex=1, currentRoot 0xa510ab280ff0ebc8adc282304893d439903055dab24279b4ed556b4e657d464b — exactly one settle has verified a real Groth16 proof against this pool (verifyProof gates _settle before the leaf append). CUDA-produced (the box runs sp1-cuda-6.2.4 only).
_deployed_onchain_sepolia_live.deployed_generation_note: This is the cBTC-real-BTC-tokenization re-prove generation (settle 0x00d5b572 / reflection 0x005e6adc), NOT the 2026-06-19 E2 record below and NOT the authoritative top-level pin. The deployed ELF sha256/bytes for this generation are not recorded here; reconcile from that re-prove's artifacts if a redeploy needs them (the next redeploy targets the top-level vkeys regardless).

superseded_e2_2026_06_19.note: Prior record claimed this was live; an on-chain read on 2026-06-25 showed it had been superseded by the 0x00d5b572 generation above. Kept for history only.

_deployed_onchain_sepolia_live.mainnet_note: Mainnet re-anchor/re-prove remains separate in ops/CHECKLIST-mainnet-reprove.md.
